items.raw_desc: PC játék Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II - PC:Fans of the iconic Starwars saga, beware. The most successful Star Wars action game to date brings its second sequel to build on the previous installment. The game's story takes the player to the period between the Star Wars movies: Episode III of Revenge of the Sith and Star Wars: Episode IV of A New Hope. You will take on the role of Starkiller, a former apprentice of the mysterious Darth Vader, with whom you will embark on a galactic adventure filled with diverse enemies. In order to defend yourself, you will have to discover all of Starkiller's abilities, which are greatly improved in this installment, and the game promises even more "carnage" than in the last installment. You will be able to use e.g. so-called Mind Trick, or the ability to confuse the minds of your enemies, pitting them against their own allies, or the Force Grenade ability, where you grab someone, charge them with lightning, and then send them flying. items.raw_desc: Társasjáték HitStory:                An evening of laughter with the HitStory board gameGet ready for an evening of rhythm, laughter and musical memories with the HitStory board game. The game is ideal for parties with friends or family, where each song becomes a challenge and an opportunity to have fun. Start the best playlist and listen carefully. Your task is to guess the year in which each song was released. If you manage to guess both the title of the song and the name of the artist, you will get points and everyone will applaud you. For even more fun, activate the "Surprise Guest" mode and turn each round into an unexpected surprise. Play continues until one player scores 7 points or the last refrain of the night is played - either way, the winner will be the star of the night. The game uses the HitStory app, which can be downloaded for free from Google Play or the App Store. You'll also need a mobile phone with an internet connection and a Spotify Premium account.                             12+        recommended age...
